prompt: Estoy implementando un sistema de fusión de árboles. Dame una lista de criterios de puntuación (scoring) para detectar duplicados de personas, priorizando los parentescos sobre los nombres.

assertions.name: lineage_priority
assertions.text: Scoring list prioritizes lineage/parents over names

assertions.name: parent_score_high
assertions.text: Score for both parents is significantly high

assertions.name: negatives_included
assertions.text: Includes negative scores for conflicts like anachronisms
